name: slash command: accepts --flag value pairs; long-form only (no -f shorthand)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/measure-rubric.sh" --n 25 --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -E 'iterating 25 commits' out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
setup: git init -q && git config user.email t@t && git config user.name t && for i in $(seq 1 5); do echo "$i">f && git add f && git commit -q -m "c$i"; done
